'''''[https://www.indiatodaygaming.com/ India Today Gaming]''''' in association with '''''[https://www.instagram.com/esportsxo/ Esports XO]''''' present a BGMI tournament called '''''India Today's Dangal''''' with a prize pool of ₹3,50,000 INR

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{BroadcasterCard
|position=Commentator
|b1=CrackJacker Gaming
|b2=RA1
}}

===Format===
''''' India Today's Dangal:''' 29th October 2021 to 1st November 2021.''

Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]]

* ''A total of 20 teams (17 Invited + 3 Qualified from the Underdog Leg) will compete in the event.''
* ''Teams will play a total of 16 matches over a period of 4 days.
* ''5 Matches for the first 4 days and a single match on the final day.''
====Matchdays====
* ''4 Matchdays:  5 Matches for the first 4 days and a single match on the final day.''
** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''E>>M>>E>>M>>E
